ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price of a single unit of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the supplier providing the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product to be reordered when the stock level falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_manager" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for managing the warehouse */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the warehouse manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_demand" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order demand record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "demand" INTEGER /* Number of units ordered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date on which the order was shipped (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_demand_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_demand_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
